ref: a law that limits a right or freedom set out in this chapter is not invalid solely because the law exceeds the limits imposed by this chapter if the law is reasonably capable of a more restricted interpretation that does not exceed those limits, and in that case, the law must be construed in accordance with the more restricted interpretation.
cand_A: One law explains the necessity and freedom in this section; it does not imply that there is no effectiveness when it is defined by the principles outlined in this section, provided the explanations can strengthen the necessary understanding without exceeding the principles defined in this section. In that regard, it is appropriate to strengthen the understanding of its explanation.
cand_B: a law that limits the rights and freedoms set forth in this article shall not be deemed invalid when it conflicts with the limits prescribed by this article, provided that the limits of its interpretation can be strengthened so as not to exceed the limits prescribed by this article. in that regard, the boundaries of its definition must be strengthened.
cand_C: A statute restricting the rights and privileges described in this chapter does not mean that it is without force when it is inconsistent with the limits defined by this chapter, and if the limitations described in this chapter may be enforced, so as not to exceed the limits prescribed by this chapter. In that regard, the definition limits should be strengthened.
cand_D: A law that limits the rights and freedoms described in this chapter does not mean it is without force when it conflicts with the limitations specified in this chapter. If the described limitation can be enforced, so that it does not exceed the limitations specified in this chapter, then in that regard, the limitation of its definition must be enforced.

source_text: Finding out early that you have dementia means you can get help sooner.
ref: Na nomu kila taumada ni tauvi iko na dementia e kena ibalebale ni rawa ni vukei iko vakatotolo na kenadau.
cand_A: Ni ko kila totolo ni o tauvi dementia e kena ibalebale ni o na rawa ni vukei vakatotolo.
cand_B: E sega ni veivakawati i yaco mo ni sa na yadra na nomu vakatutu.
cand_C: Na kila e liu ni tiko vei iko na dementia, e kena ibalebale o na rawa ni ciqoma na veivuke vakatotolo.
cand_D: Na nomu kila totolo ni tiko vei iko na mate ni vakasama e kena ibalebale ni rawa ni o rawata na veivuke ena gauna totolo.

source_text: If you experience difficulty breathing, seek immediate medical attention.
ref: Kevaka o vakila na taqa ni icegu, qarai vakatotolo na veivuke vakavuniwai.
cand_A: Kevaka o sotava na dredre ni cegu, qara vuniwai sara ga vakatotolo.
cand_B: Kei te mōhio koe ki te uaua ki te manawa, kitea te āwhina rongoā inā te wā.
cand_C: Kevaka e dredre mo cegu, vaqara veiqaravi vakavuniwai vakatotolo.
cand_D: Ke o sotava ni dredre na nomu cegu, lai qaravi vakavuniwai sara.

source_text: a power conferred by this constitution to make, grant or issue any instrument (including a proclamation, order, regulation or rule), or to give any direction, includes the power, exercisable in the like manner, to repeal, rescind, revoke, amend or vary the instrument or direction.
ref: na kaukauwa e soli ena yavunivakavulewa qo me buli, vakadonuya se solia e dua na ivola (okati kina na itukutuku ni matanitu, ivakaro, lawasau se lewa) se vakatulewa, e soli tale ga kina na kaukauwa me bokoci, veisautaki na vakatulewa.
cand_A: Na kaukauwa e soli ena Yavu ni Vakavulewa oqo me vakayacora, solia se solia e dua na iyaya (oka kina e dua na ivakaro, ivakaro, lawa se lawa), se me solia e dua na veidusimaki, e okati kina na kaukauwa, e rawa ni vakayagataki ena sala vata oqori, me bokoci laivi, bokoci laivi, veisautaka se veisautaka na iyaya se veidusimaki.
cand_B: e dua na kaukauwa e solia na lawatu oqo me cakava, solia se solia e dua na iyaya ni cakacaka (oka kina e dua na itukutuku, ivakaro, lawatu se lawa), se me solia e dua na veidusimaki, e oka kina na kaukauwa, e rawa ni vakayagataki ena sala vata ga oqori, me bokoca, bokoca, bokoca, veisautaka se veisautaka na iyaya se veidusimaki.
cand_C: E dua na kaukauwa e soli mai na iVakavulewa oqo me bulia, me solia se me vakaqaqa e dua na ivola ni vakatulewa (oka kina na ivakavuvuli, na ivakaro, na ivakarau ni cakacaka se na vunau), se me solia e dua na veidusimaki, e oka talega kina na kaukauwa, e rawa ni vakayacori ena iwalewale vata ga, me bokoca, me vakasukai lesu, me vakavinakataka se me veisautaka na ivola ni vakatulewa se na veidusimaki oqori.
cand_D: e dua na kauwai e solia mai na i tutu ni klokovu ena makawa oqo me cakava, me solia se me tukuna e dua na iyaya (ka uvei, i volopola, i tu ra se i vosa), se me solia e dua na itutu, e caka na kauwai, me dua tale na i gole, me tarova, me toso, se me veisau na iyaya se itutu.

source_text: ena yavunivakavulewa qo, ena kena vakamacalataki e dua na tamata, se matabose, se tabacakacaka e sega ni vakarorogo se vakarurugi vua e dua se dua na matabose se tabacakacaka ena nona qaravi itavi se vakayagataka na nona kaukauwa, e sega ni kena ibalebale me tarova na kaukauwa ni mataveilewai me vaqaqa na tamata, se matabose, se tabacakacaka kevaka e sa vakayacora se vakayagataka na nona kaukauwa me vaka e virikotori ena yavunivakavulewa qo se kevaka na tamata ya, matabose se tabacakacaka e dodonu se sega ni dodonu me vakayacora se vakayagataka na nona kaukauwa.
ref: a provision of this constitution to the effect that a person or authority is not subject to the direction or control of any other person or authority in the performance of functions or the exercise of powers is not to be construed as precluding a court of law from exercising jurisdiction in relation to a question whether the first mentioned person or authority has performed the functions or exercised the powers in accordance with this constitution or whether that person or authority should or should not perform the functions or exercise the powers.
cand_A: In this Constitution, the definition of a person, or board, or department is not subject to or subordinate to any or any board or department in the performance or exercise of its powers, it does not mean to prevent the power of the court to investigate the person, or board, or department if it has exercised or exercised its powers as provided in this constitution or if The person, board or department may or may not exercise or exercise its powers.
cand_B: In this constitution, it is explained that a person, or an organization, or a body that does not respect or protect another person or organization or body in its duties or using its power, does not imply that the power of the judiciary should prevent the person, organization, or body if it has exercised or used its power as stated in this constitution, or if that person, organization, or body should or should not exercise or use its power.
cand_C: in this provision, in the description of a person, body, or agency that is not a widow or a servant of a person or a body or agency in the performance of its duties or exercise of its powers, it does not mean that the powers of the courts to investigate a person, body, or agency that is, the board or agency may or may not have the right to exercise or exercise its powers.
cand_D: In this Constitution, the description of a person, council, or department/agency as not being subject to or under the direction of another or another council or department/agency in the performance of its duties or the exercise of its powers, does not mean to limit the power of the courts to inquire into the actions of that person, council, or department/agency whether it has performed or exercised its powers as set out in this Constitution or whether that person, council, or department/agency ought or ought not to have performed or exercised its powers.

source_text: in the performance of its functions or the exercise of its authority and powers, the commission shall be independent and shall not be subject to the direction or control of any person or authority, except by a court of law or as otherwise prescribed by written law. ----------------------- page -----------------------
ref: ena vakayagataki ni kaukauwa ena tikina qo, na matabose ena sega ni vakarogoca na vakatulewa ni dua tale na tamata, se matabose, se tabacakacaka, vakavo ke vakarota na mataveilewai se virikotori ena yavunivakavulewa qo se na lawa tabaki.

cand_C: Ena vakayacori ni nona itavi se ena vakayagataki ni nona dodonu kei na kaukauwa, na komiti ena galala ka ena sega ni qali kina nodra veidusimaki se vakatulewa e dua na tamata se matanitu, vakavo ga mai na mataveilewai se me vaka e vakatakilai ena lawa volai.
cand_D: ena kena vakayacori na nona cakacaka se na kena vakayagataki na nona lewa kei na kaukauwa, na komisi ena tu vakataki koya ka na sega ni vakarurugi ena veidusimaki se lewa ni dua na tamata se lewa, vakavo ga ena mataveilewai ni lawa se me vaka e virikotori ena lawa volai. tabana e

source_text: kana yava ni toa
ref: [Literal Translation:to eat chicken feet] [Meaning:Your authority is effective in your territory (Vanua), but is irrelevant here in this territory. Each can be a chief in his own land. U 1. were ubiubi Literally translated as “to fake the work of cutting grass, weeds, by just knocking vegetation down to lie against the ground.” Meaning: To pretend to work. This idiom may imply that someone is not telling the whole story, that they are concealing some truth. 2. Sega ni ura me sa tei damu . Literally translated as “no prawn just turns red (unless someone has cooked it.” Meaning: Where there is smoke there is fire. The truth will come out. There must be a cause for something to happen, and the truth will be known. V and Y 1. vaka e vidi na ura Literally translated as “like a prawn springing into action.” Meaning: It conveys the notion of something that jumps suddenly into action, as the prawn does. 2. Sa viritaki na kena vatu . Literally translated as “a stone has already been thrown at it.” | It is already decisively rejected. Can also mean that the decision has been made to quit something, such as a game. A child may spit on a stone and throw the stone into the bushes to indicate that he is quitting a game. The notion is that if you found the stone he would be forced to stay 3. veivunauci vaka i Ra kasala . Literally translated as “to give advice as a kasala fish does” Meaning: You are good at giving advice but failing to follow that advice yourself. 4. Sa suasua na yavamu . Literally translated as “Your legs are still wet” This implies that you are new to this place, having just arrived ashore. You are a newcomer here and should not speak with assurance. 6. Yavita dole na mataisau Literally translated as “to club the carpenter prematurely.” | To judge a job prematurely before the work has been completed.]
cand_A: way to the ocean
cand_B: one who is always moving from place to place
cand_C: eat chicken legs
cand_D: Eat the chicken's leg.

source_text: na lewenipalimedi mera digitaki ena veidigidigi vuni ka vakayacori ena savasava ka vakamatau ka solia vua na veimatavakaturi kei na veimatapolitiki mera cakacaka ena galala, kei na kena vakau na itukutuku me vakayacori ena galala, kei na mataveilewai me soli vua na galala ni vakatulewa ka qarava na cakacaka ni veidigidigi na matabose ni veidigidigi, me vaka e virikotori ena yavunivakavulewa qo se dua na lawa tabaki e kovuta na kena ivakarau ni kena vakayacori na veidigidigi. iwalewale ni veidigidigi veiraurau .—() na lewenipalimedi era na digitaki ena iwiliwili ni mata dola raraba. ena iwalewale ni veidigidigi qo, na levu na dabedabe e winitaka e dua na matapolitiki se ilawalawa ni matavakaturi, ena veiraurau kei na levu ni digidigi e rawata na matapolitiki se ilawalawa ni matavakaturi. ena iwalewale ni veidigidigi qo na tamata taucoko e veidigidigi me dua na nona idigidigi, qo e kena ibalebale ni digidigi ni lewenivanua yadua e wiliki vakatautauvata ka na tu tale ga e dua na ivola ni veidigidigi vakamatanitu e tabaki kina o ira na lewenivanua taucoko era volayaca ni veidigidigi.
ref: the members of parliament shall be chosen by secret ballot in free and fair elections administered by the electoral commission, in accordance with this constitution and any written law governing elections. proportional representation system .—() the election of members of parliament is by a multi-member open list system of proportional representation, under which each voter has one vote, with each vote being of equal value, in a single national electoral roll comprising all the registered voters. ----------------------- page -----------------------
cand_A: Members of Parliament shall be elected by secret elections conducted in a fair and fair manner and shall give the parties and political parties the freedom to act freely, and the submission of information shall be done freely, and the courts shall be given the freedom to decide and administer the electoral process by the Electoral Board, in accordance with this Constitution or any published law governing the manner in which it shall be conducted. the election. Fair Election Procedure.—() Members of Parliament shall be elected by the number of open representatives. In this electoral system, the number of seats won by a political party or group of parliamentarians is proportional to the number of votes won by the party or group of parliamentarians. In this election system everyone votes to cast a ballot, this means that each citizen's vote is counted equally and there will also be a national election roll that lists all registered voters.
cand_B: members of parliament to be elected by secret elections conducted in a fair and transparent manner and to allow elected officials and politicians to act freely, and to send information freely, and the judiciary to be given the freedom to decide and conduct the electoral process. covering its procedure for conducting elections. method of proportional election .—() members of parliament shall be elected by universal open representation. in this electoral system, the number of seats won by a politician or candidate group is proportional to the number of votes received by the politician or candidate group. in this electoral system everyone who votes will have one vote, which means that the votes of each citizen are counted equally and there will be a national ballot paper that contains all the citizens who are registered to vote.
cand_C: The people will vote for candidates in free elections that will take place in a fair manner, ensuring the provision of opportunities for both political candidates and political parties to operate freely, and the delivery of information to be conducted freely, and the judiciary to grant the freedom of decision-making overseeing the electoral activities of the electoral commission, as stipulated in this constitution or any law that governs the conduct of elections. Election procedures. — () the voters will be chosen based on a list of registered voters. in the electoral process, the majority of voters will constitute a political party or a coalition of parties, in representation and the number of votes gained by a political party or a coalition of parties. in the electoral process, every citizen has the right to vote, which means that the voting of each eligible citizen shall be conducted equally and there will also be one electoral roll recorded in which all eligible voters are listed for the entire electorate.
cand_D: Members of Parliament shall be elected by secret ballot, conducted fairly and impartially, allowing political parties and candidates to campaign freely, and the transmission of information to be done freely, and the judiciary to be given freedom of decision, and the electoral commission to administer the electoral process, as provided in this Constitution or any published law governing the conduct of elections. Proportional representation electoral system. —() Members of Parliament shall be elected by popular vote. In this electoral system, the number of seats won by a political party or group of candidates shall be proportionate to the number of votes obtained by that political party or group of candidates. In this electoral system, every person voting has one vote, which means that each citizen's vote is counted equally, and there shall also be a national electoral roll published containing all citizens registered to vote.

source_text: service in an office created by, or continued in existence under, this “session”, in relation to parliament, means a sitting of parliament starting when it first meets after a prorogation of parliament or a dissolution of parliament and ending when parliament is next prorogued or parliament is next dissolved; “sentence of imprisonment” does not include a suspended sentence or a sentence of imprisonment with the option of a fine; “sitting”, in relation to parliament, means a period during which parliament is sitting continuously without adjournment, and includes any period during which parliament is in committee; “speaker” means the speaker of parliament; “state” means the republic of fiji; “state of emergency” means a state of emergency proclaimed under chapter ; “state service” means the public service and the disciplined force; “subordinate court” means any court of law established for the state other than the high court, court of appeal, supreme court or a court established by a disciplinary law; “subordinate law” means any instrument made in exercise of a power to make the instrument conferred by an act, and includes regulations, rules, orders, by-laws or declarations; “this constitution” means the constitution of the republic of fiji; and “written law” means an act, decree, promulgation and subordinate law made under those acts, decrees or promulgations. ----------------------- page -----------------------
ref: veiqaravi e tauyavutaki, se veiqaravi e tomani ena yavunivakavulewa qo; “gauna ni bose” ena palimedi, e vakaibalebale ena gauna e dabe kina na palimedi ni oti kena rube se bokoci na palimedi ka qai oti ni sa vakarubeci se sa bokoci tale na palimedi; “tau ni totogi” e sega ni wili kina na veilewai ka vakarubeci se na tau ni totogi kevaka e lavaki me totogi ilavo; “dabe” e na palimedi, e vakaibalebale ena gauna e bose tiko kina na palimedi ka sega ni vakarubeci, ka okati tale ga na gauna e bose kina na komiti ni palimedi; “sipika” e vakaibalebale vua na sipika ni palimedi; “vakamatanitu” e vakaibalebale ena matanitu tugagala o viti; “tikoleqa vakamatanitu” e vakaibalebale ena gauna e tikoleqa kina na matanitu me vaka e vakamacalataki ena wase ; “cakacaka vakamatanitu” e vakaibalebale ena cakacaka vakamatanitu kei na ----------------------- page ----------------------- “mataveilewai lalai tale e so” e vakaibalebale i na dua na mataveilewai tauyavutaki vakalawa e viti ka sega ni oka kina na mataveilewai e cake, mataveilewai ni rogokudru, mataveilewai cecere, se dua tale na mataveilewai ka tauyavutaki vakalawa ena vuku ni veitotogitaki ni ivakarau ni cakacaka; “lawa veivuke” e vakaibalebale ena dua na vakatulewa e vakaturi ena dua na kaukauwa me vakadeitaka na vakatulewa e soli ena lawa tabaki, okati kina na lawasau, lewa, ivakaro, lawatiki se itukutuku; “yavunivakavulewa qo” e vakaibalebale ena yavunivakavulewa ni matanitu tugalala o viti ; kei na ‘lawa tabaki” e vakaibalebale ena lawatu, dikiri, poromoliqeti kei na lawa veivuke e yavutaki mai na lawatu, dikiri kei na poromoliqeti.
cand_A: veiqaravi ena dua na valenivolavola e bulia, se tomani tikoga ena ruku ni “soqoni” oqo, me baleta na palimedi, e kena ibalebale e dua na dabe ni palimedi ka tekivu ena gauna e sota kina ena imatai ni gauna ni oti e dua na kena vakalekalekataki na palimedi se kena vakawabokotaki na palimedi ka cava ena gauna e vakabalavutaki tale kina na palimedi se vakawabokotaki tale na palimedi; “itotogi ni vesu” e sega ni okati kina na itotogi vakalekaleka se na itotogi ni vesu kei na digidigi ni itotogi; “dabe”, me baleta na palimedi, e kena ibalebale e dua na gauna e dabe tikoga kina na palimedi ka sega ni vakadaroi, ka okati kina na gauna cava ga e tiko kina na komiti ni palimedi; “vosa” e kena ibalebale na vosa ni palimedi; “matanitu” e kena ibalebale na matanitu o viti; “ituvaki ni leqa tubukoso” e kena ibalebale e dua na ituvaki ni leqa tubukoso e kacivaki ena ruku ni wase ; “veiqaravi vakamatanitu” e kena ibalebale na veiqaravi raraba kei na kaukauwa ni veivakadodonutaki; “mataveilewai lailai” e kena ibalebale e dua na mataveilewai ni lawa e tauyavutaki me baleta na matanitu ka sega ni mataveilewai cecere, mataveilewai ni veibeitaki, mataveilewai cecere se dua na mataveilewai e tauyavutaki ena lawa ni veivakadodonutaki; “lawa vakamalumalumutaki” e kena ibalebale e dua na iyaya ni cakacaka e caka ena kena vakayagataki e dua na kaukauwa me caka kina na iyaya ni cakacaka e soli ena dua na lawa, ka okati kina na lawatu, lawatu, ivakaro, lawa lalai se veivakadeitaki; “yavu ni vakavulewa oqo” e kena ibalebale na yavu ni vakavulewa ni matanitu o viti; kei na “lawa volai” e kena ibalebale e dua na cakacaka, lewa, veivakadeitaki kei na lawa lailai e caka ena ruku ni veicakacaka, vakatulewa se veivakadeitaki oqori. tabana e
cand_B: na ikota e dua na ofisa e buli koya, se a vakalailaitaki tiko e sota kei, na “vuli”, me baleta na parliament, e kaya na dua na ikota ni parliament e tekivutaka ni a sa tada vakatereki na parliament se dua na kalawa ni parliament ka sa oti ni na kentaki tale na parliament se na kalawa tale na parliament; “vakavota e na vale” e segai me vaka e dua na vakavota e taucoko se e dua na vakavota e na vale e tu vei na ivoli; “ikota”, me baleta na parliament, e kaya na gauna e vakarautaki tiko na parliament e sega ni dokai, ka voli talega kina na gauna e tu na parliament e na komiti; “suka” e kaya na suka ni parliament; “vanua” e kaya na republic of fiji; “vanua ni vakalialiai” e kaya na vanua ni vakalialiai e vakaraitaka e na chapter; “vanua ni veivakauqeti” e kaya na cakacaka ni kominiti kei na veika e taqomaki; “vale vakamatani” e kaya na vale ni lawa e cakacaka kina na vanua e sega ni vale levu, vale ni vakadodonu, vale ni kacewa se oqo na vale e bulia e dua na lawa ni veivakauqeti; “lawa vakamatani” e kaya na ivola e vakaraitaka e na nodra cakacaka na ivola e tu e na ivola, ka voli talega kina na ivakarau, na ivakarau, na ivola, na bula e na laws; “na ivakadinadina ni veika” e kaya na ivakadinadina ni vanua e bulia na republic of fiji; ka “lawa e volai” e kaya na ivola, na ivakatakarakara, na ivakarau, ka me baleta na lawa e bulia e na nodra ivola, na ivakatakarakara se na ivakarau.
cand_C: cakacaka ena valenivolavola a tauyavutaki, se tomani tikoga ena ruku ni “soqoni” oqo, ni baleta na palimedi, kena ibalebale na soqoni ni palimedi e tekivu ni ra qai soqoni vata tale ni oti na saqati ni palimedi se tatalai ni palimedi ka cava ni sa na qai saqati tale se tatalai tale na palimedi; “ivakaro ni veivesu” e sega ni okati kina na ivakaro ni veivesu e vakatikori se na ivakaro ni veivesu ka tu kina na galala ni sauma na dainivua; “soqoni”, ni baleta na palimedi, kena ibalebale e dua na gauna e soqoni tiko ga kina na palimedi ka sega ni tarovi, ka okati kina na gauna kece e tiko kina na palimedi ena komiti; “daunivosa” kena ibalebale na daunivosa ni palimedi; “matanitu” kena ibalebale na Ripabuliki o Viti; “ituvaki ni leqa tubukoso” kena ibalebale e dua na ituvaki ni leqa tubukoso e kacivaki ena ruku ni wase ni ivola ; “cakacaka ni matanitu” kena ibalebale na cakacaka vakapabuliki kei na mataivalu vakatulewa; “mataveilewai vakalalai” kena ibalebale na mataveilewai e tauyavutaki me baleta na matanitu e duidui mai na Mataveilewai Cokonaki, na Mataveilewai ni Veitarogi Tale, na Mataveilewai Levu Sara se na mataveilewai e tauyavutaki mai na lawa ni veivakarautaki; “lawa ni ruku” kena ibalebale na ivola ni vunau e cakava ena ruku ni kaukauwa me cakava na ivola ni vunau e soli mai na vunau, ka okati kina na veivakarautaki, veivakatulewataki, ivakaro, lawa vakalailai se veivakadaroi; “na Yavu ni Vakavulewa oqo” kena ibalebale na Yavu ni Vakavulewa ni Ripabuliki o Viti; ka “lawa e volai” kena ibalebale na vunau, ivakaro, veivakadaroi kei na lawa ni ruku e cakava ena ruku ni vunau, ivakaro se veivakadaroi oqori.
cand_D: veiqaravi ena dua na valenivolavola e tauyavutaki ena, se tomani tiko ena ruku ni "soqoni" oqo, me baleta na parliament, e kena ibalebale e dua na soqoni ni parliament tekivu ena imatai ni gauna e bose kina ni oti e dua na prorogation ni parliament se dua na dissolution ni parliament ka cava ena gauna e tarava kina na parliament prorogued se parliament next dissolved; "itotogi ni valeniveivesu" e sega ni okati kina na itotogi tu vakawawa se na itotogi ni valeniveivesu kei na digidigi ni dua na itotogi; "sitting", me baleta na parliament, e kena ibalebale e dua na gauna e dabe tikoga kina na parliament ka sega ni lokuyara, ka okati kina e dua na gauna e tiko kina na parliament ena komiti; "speaker" kena ibalebale na speaker of parliament; "State" kena ibalebale na Republic of Fiji; "state of emergency" kena ibalebale na state of emergency kacivaki ena wase ; "veiqaravi ni matanitu" e kena ibalebale na veiqaravi raraba kei na mataivalu vakaivakarau; "mataveilewai e ra" kena ibalebale e dua na mataveilewai e tauyavutaki me baleta na yasana ka sega ni mataveilewai e cake, mataveilewai ni kerekere, mataveilewai cecere se dua na mataveilewai e tauyavutaki ena lawa ni veivakadodonutaki; "subordinate law" e kena ibalebale e dua na iyaya e caka ena kena vakayagataki e dua na kaukauwa me caka kina na iyaya e soli ena dua na lawa, ka okati kina na lawa, lawa, ivakaro, lawa se itukutuku; "Yavu ni Vakavulewa Oqo" e kena ibalebale na Yavu ni Vakavulewa ni Republic of Fiji; kei na "lawa volai" e kena ibalebale e dua na cakacaka, lewa, vakaraitaki kei na lawa e caka ena ruku ni lawa, lawa se vakaraitaki oqori. ----------------------- tabana -----------------------

ref: valenivolavola ni lewenivanua, mai na veibeitaki ni basulawa, mai na dua na veileti se ena dua na ka e lavaki mai na mataveilewai, mataveivaqaqai, se matabose ena dua na veilewai, oka kina na veilewai vakalawa, mataivalu, iwalewale ni veitotogitaki, se na veilewai vakacakacaka kei na ivakaro se vakatulewa ni mataveilewai, mataveivaqaqai se matabose, vu mai na nona vakaitavi, digitaki se lewena na matanitu mai na ika ni tiseba, yacova na imatai ni dabe ni imatai ni palimedi, ni sa tauri oti na vakayacori se sega ni vakayacori ka wili me cala vakalawa ena tikina i na , i na , i na , i na , i na , kei na i na ni dikiri ni basulawa (ka vakarautaki ena dikiri ni basulawa ena gauna e tauri kina na yavunivakavulewa qo). ----------------------- page ----------------------- vakadeitaki ni veivagalalataki .—() e dina ni virikotori ena yavunivakavulewa qo, ia na wase qo kei na veivagalalataki e soli se tomani ena wase qo ena sega ni rawa ni raicilesu, veisautaki, vukici, vakadaroi se bokoci.
cand_A: dua na itutu vakamatanitu, mai na dua na veibeitaki vakalawa kei na dua na itavi vakamatanitu se dua tale na itavi ena dua na mataveilewai, mataveilewai se komisi, ena dua na veilewai okati kina e dua na veilewai vakalawa, mataivalu, veivakadodonutaki se vakacakacaka kei na dua na ivakaro se lewa ni dua na mataveilewai, mataveilewai se komisi, me vaka e dua na vua ni dua na vakaitavi vakadodonu se sega ni vakadodonu ena dember na imatai ni simberte, lesi se mai na matanitu na imatai ni palimedi e digitaki ni oti na kena tekivutaki na lawatu oqo, ia kevaka e dua na immunity vakaoqo e sega ni vakayagataki ki na dua na ivalavala se cala e vakavuna e dua na cala ena ruku ni wase ki na , ki na , ki na , ki na , ki na , kei na ki na lawa ni cala (me vaka e virikotori ena lawa ni cala ena siga e tekivutaki kina na lawatu oqo ni). ----------------------- tabana e ------------------------- na galala e vakadeitaki .—() veitalia e dua na ka e tiko ena lawatu oqo, na wase oqo kei na galala cava ga e soli tale se tomani tiko ena wase oqo ena sega ni vakavoutaki, vakavoui tale.
cand_B: E dua na itutu vakamatanitu, mai na dua na veibeitaki vakalawa kei na dua na itavi vakamatanitu se dua tale na itavi ena dua na mataveilewai, mataveilewai se komisi, ena dua na cakacaka oka kina e dua na cakacaka vakalawa, mataivalu, veivakadodonutaki se cakacaka kei na dua na ivakaro se vakatulewa ni dua na mataveilewai, mataveilewai se komisi, ena vuku ni dua na vakaitavi vakadodonu se sega ni vakadodonu, lesi se vakaitavi ena matanitu mai na Tiseba ki na tikinisiga ni imatai ni bose ni imatai ni palimedi digitaki ni oti na kena tekivu ni Yavu ni Vakavulewa oqo, ia e sega ni yaga na galala oqori ki na dua na cakacaka se vakacalai e dua na cala ena ruku ni wase ki na , ki na , ki na , ki na , kei na lawa ni cala (me vaka e virikotori ena lawa ni basulawa ena tikinisiga ni kena tekivu na Yavu ni Vakavulewa oqo). ----------------------- tabana ----------------------- na galala e vakadeitaki .—() veitalia na veika e tiko ena Yavu ni Vakavulewa oqo, na wase oqo kei na galala e soli se tomani tiko ena wase oqo ena sega ni railesuvi, veisautaki, veisautaki, bokoci se bokoci laivi.
cand_C:
nai tutu vakapolitiki, mai na dua na veitosoyaki cala, kei na dua na cakacaka vakalawa se dua tale na i-vakarau ni dinau ena dua na matanivunau, matabose se komiti, ena dua na i-vakarau ni veivosaki e oka kina na i-vakarau vakalawa, vakasotia, ni veivakadisiplinini se vakaprofesio, kei na dua na vakatulewa se i-otioti ni lewa mai na dua na matanivunau, matabose se komiti, ena vuku ni dua na kena i-wiliwili vakadodonu se tawa vakadodonu, i-lesilesi se i-oqoloi ena matanitu mai na Tiseba ki na siga ni matai ni bose ni matai ni palimeni sa digitaki ni oti na tekivutaki ni i-vakavulewa oqo, ia e sega ni okati kina na i-vakarau ni veivakataucokataki oqori ki na dua na i-cakacaka se i-vosaki e okati me cala ena i-wasewase ki na , ki na , ki na , ki na , ki na , kei na ki na ni i-vakarau ni cala (me vaka e tukuni ena i-vakarau ni cala ena siga ni tekivutaki ni i-vakavulewa oqo).
Nai Veivakataucokataki Sa Vakadeitaki. —() Se mani vakaevei na ka e tiko ena i-vakavulewa oqo, na wase oqo kei na dua na veivakataucokataki sa soli se tomani tiko ena wase oqo ena sega ni raici tale, vakatulewataki, veisautaki, bokoci se vakatalai tani.
cand_D: na iukele ni itukutuku, mai na veika bula ni cavamia kei na veika e so e dua na laurai, na kena i vakarauvaki ni veika e caka kina o ira na lawa kei na komiti, mai na veika e so e rawa ni se ni yaco ena kena vakatulewa, kena ivakarau, ni vakacava na veika e caka tu, da me caka duadua, ni o na veika e tomani ena i tavi, me yacova na gauna e dua na i liuliu e na toso ni veika e ra wawa ni veiliutaki ni i liuliu mai na vula ni siga ni ubia o tedei yatika nem mai na i nuluma ni veika. Na vuku ni veika eda vakayacora, taucoko na kena tawaseiena, ka ra qai toso tiko na veika e rui liu e veidigidigi, ka me soto ena veika ni veiliutaki, ni rui qaqa o ira na kilai ni veika e caka tu ena ikuri ni veika.
